name: Brine May

rules.text: When you roll a success on an Athletics check to swim, you get a critical success instead.
rules.title: {item|name}

description: Your mother was a sea hag, granting you one sea-green or blue eye. You find comfort both in the sea and on the shore. Whenever you roll a success on an Athletics check to , you get a critical success instead. If you end your turn in water without having succeeded at a Swim action that round, you don't sink (but you might still be moved by the current).
